en.problem: Joshua needs one daily operating dashboard for tasks, weekly plan, logs and portfolio review.
en.input: GPS markdown and reference static MVP site.
en.aiProcess: Structure the GPS into dashboard, Today, weekly plan, priorities, schedule, logs and portfolio.
en.siteProcess: Build a static bilingual page with navigation, cards, mobile layout and read-aloud.
en.learned: A structured GPS document can become a daily bilingual site.
en.nextImprovement: Move more daily updates into JSON files and add screenshot links.

zh.problem: Joshua 需要一个每日操作台，用于任务、周计划、日志和作品集复盘。
zh.input: GPS Markdown 和参考静态 MVP 网站。
zh.aiProcess: 把 GPS 结构化为 Dashboard、Today、周计划、优先级、日程、日志和 Portfolio。
zh.siteProcess: 制作带导航、卡片、手机端布局和朗读功能的静态双语页面。
zh.learned: 结构化 GPS 文档可以变成每日使用的双语网站。
zh.nextImprovement: 把更多每日更新拆进 JSON 文件，并增加截图链接。
